name: Survival island - FPE
description:
Just a silly lil' idea i had!!!!!!

God I hope no one made this before me...that would be awkward.

Art edited by @Terry Crews (Yes, THE @Terry Crews. I gave him a random cruise ship image, and this is what he gave me five minutes later.)

Tell me if there’s any issues!!! I spent so much time trying to make this bot 😭

Anyway, here's the story in all this clutter, spoken in horrible english.

YIPPERSS!!! ITSG WASFG DA SUMMA!!!!! YOOU GO HOME!!! BUT WHAT? SUMMA VACTION THROUGH SCHOOLS???? TO CARRIBIEN??? YES PLEASEEE!!! BUT OH NOES!!!! THE IDOT CAPTAM CRSHED ITO I IS LAND!!!!!!!! THE SHIP GOES "EEEERRRRRRR"

TAGS: FPE, Fundamental paper education, katie, kaaatie.
